sources.title: Parliamentary Business
sources.purpose: Top-level entrypoint for official sitting and proceeding inventory discovery.

sources.title: Historic Journals of the House
sources.purpose: Historic digitised journals archive for older sitting and proceeding reconciliation.

sources.title: Daily progress in the House
sources.purpose: Outcome and progression record for sitting-day reconciliation.

sources.title: Order Paper
sources.purpose: Agenda source for scheduled business and reconciling planned versus actual proceedings.

sources.title: Indexes to the Journals
sources.purpose: Cumulative and sessional index surface for reconciling procedural records.

sources.title: Weekly Journals Archive
sources.purpose: Weekly official record for reconciling sitting and proceeding completeness.

sources.title: Sessional Journals archive
sources.purpose: Sessional official record for reconciliations spanning completed Parliaments.

sources.title: Hansard
sources.purpose: Current official proceedings text for final comparison and coverage language.

coverage_notes: This manifest records the official inventory sources needed for historical sitting/proceeding reconciliation.
It does not assert that full reconciliation has been completed.
Historical completeness claims remain blocked until the corpus is compared against these official sources.
Historic Journals, Sessional Journals, Weekly Journals, Daily Progress, Order Paper, and Hansard must be reconciled together before a completeness claim can be made.
